title: hieracium schmidtii subsp. balkanum
intro: Hieracium schmidtii subsp. balkanum, commonly known as the Hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant's leaves and flowers are used in herbal medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hieracium schmidtii subsp. balkanum include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in topical creams and ointments to support skin health.
